titleStmt.title: SII 5.437: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 437. (A.R. No. 146 of 1894). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE NATESA SHRINE IN THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuṉtarapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 11 vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭi
ṉ Etirāmāṇṭu makaraṉāyiṟṟu Irupattunālāṉ tiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu daśa miyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattu nāḷ melvempanāṭṭu koṭaṉūrāṉa kulacekaraccaturvvedi maṅkalattu mahāsabhai yom Ādicaṇḍeśvarade varkkup piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāva
tu miḻalaikkūṟṟattu Aṭumporuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Uṭaiyanāyakanāṉa viḻuppātarāyaṉ Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil Eḻuṉtaruḷuvitta Āvuṭaiyār Aḻakiyatirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṟkku Ittiyati cihasta
ttil Udaga māka pūvoṉṟukku virapāṇṭiyaṉāl Uda kampaṇṇiṉa nellu patiṉaiṅkalam Innellup patiṉaiṅkalamum Ivāṭṭaip pacāṉamutal viyāpārikaḷukku Ātiyiṭa nilattil nāṅ koṇṭuvarum kaṭamaiyile pūttoṟum paṇṭārattil Aḷantu piṉpu
rikaḷ kaiyyāl taravukoḷvomākavum Ippaṭi caṉtirātittavat Aḷappatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷvatākap piṭipāṭu paṇṇikkuṭuttom mahā- sabhai yom caṇḍeśvarade varkku . Ivai pālaṭaic cirāmabha ṭṭasomayāji Eḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇ
ṭi kirāmabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai karāmpiceṭṭu citevabha ṭṭavājapeyyāji Eḻuttu Ivai yiruṅkaṇṭi Āḷvāṉ bha ṭṭabrahaspatisavayāji Eḻuttu Ivai yiruṅkaṇṭi dā moda rabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai pālaṭai viṣṇubha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai kārampicceṭṭu tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa
bha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai pilākkil Āṇṭāṉbha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaṭṭamaṇi caṅkaranārāyaṇabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai Iḷaiyanārāyaṇabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai mukkaṭṭi ciyā ṉeḻuttu Ivai kārāmpicceṭṭuc citevabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai tiruvaraṅkapperumāḷ Eḻu
ttu Ivai picamaṇakku Āḷvāṉbha ṭṭa Atirātriyāji Eḻuttu Ivai vaṅkippuṟattuc colaippirāṉbha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇ(ṭ)ṭi Aḻakabha ṭṭasya Ivai picamaṇakku kecuvabha ṭṭa sarvvakṛṛtu viṉeḻuttu
ttu Ivai Iruṅkaṇṭik kovintabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai (i)bhavasvāmibha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai yajña muttibha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ivai ciraṅkaṉātabha ṭṭa ṉeḻuttu Ippiṭipā ṭeḻutiṉeṉ samvatsarapiri yaṉ prā ntūr saumitri Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.437 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
